raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX charged {$50.00} as a deposit for renting a car which should be pending because it would be withdrawn when returning the car. 
I called to put my dispute to citi-thankyou preferred today XX/XX/year> at XXXXXXXX XXXX the agent who attended me named XXXX was XXXX and raised his voice at me and hung up the call. I called again and the next agent did not identify himself and the same thing happened, mistreatment of me and hung up the phone. 
Lately this happens when one requests to speak in XXXX. I am a XXXX client with Citi bank and this happens lately in the XXXX service. 
Finally I put my dispute on the English line with very professional and friendly attention.
